extension.summary: Listen to radio stations from around the world
Ouça estações de rádio de todo o mundo
Ascultați posturi de radio din întreaga lume
extension.description: Radio Garden allows you to explore and listen to live radio stations from around the world. Created by @TrainAgain2.
O Radio Garden permite explorar e ouvir estações de rádio ao vivo de todo o mundo. Criado por @TrainAgain2.
Radio Garden vă permite să explorați și să ascultați posturi de radio în direct din întreaga lume. Creat de @TrainAgain2.
extension.disclaimer: This addon uses the unofficial Radio Garden API. The author is not affiliated with Radio Garden BV.
Este addon usa a API não oficial do Radio Garden. O autor não é afiliado à Radio Garden BV.
Acest supliment folosește API-ul neoficial Radio Garden. Autorul nu este afiliat cu Radio Garden BV.
extension.news: v1.4.1 (2026-01-28) - Fixed Icon and Fanart display issues: simplified file names for better Kodi compatibility - Updated provider and description: Created by @TrainAgain2 - New modern artwork: updated icon and fanart with a clean white background and brush-stroke style - Colors updated to match the original Radio Garden green and blue palette - Removed "Popular Stations" menu as requested - Enhanced search logic: improved accuracy and global coverage for countries and cities - Optimized search for Portuguese speakers with expanded country name translations - Maintained consistent use of plugin icon for all stations - Simplified main menu for a cleaner experience
